def toOuterMeasure {α : Type*} [MeasurableSpace α] (E : ResolutionOfIdentity α H) (x : H) : OuterMeasure α where
  measureOf w := ENNReal.ofReal ‖E.measureOf' w x‖
  empty := by
    rw [E.empty']
    simp only [ContinuousLinearMap.zero_apply, norm_zero, ofReal_zero]
  mono {w₁ w₂} h := by
    -- Use the monotonicity property of the resolution of the identity to prove that the outer measure is monotonic.
    have h₁ : ‖E.measureOf' w₁ x‖ ≤ ‖E.measureOf' w₂ x‖ := by
      -- Prove that the norm of the projection onto w₁ is less than or equal to the norm of the projection onto w₂.
      sorry
    -- Convert the inequality from real numbers to extended non-negative real numbers.
    exact ENNReal.ofReal_le_ofReal h₁
